name: Char's Hot Dog Hash
recipeIngredient: 1 d Salt and Pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Par boil the potato cubes until they are slightly tender when pierced with a fork.
2. Slice the hot dogs into coins (chunks).
3. Heat oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
4. Add the chopped onion, hot dogs, and potato cubes to the pan.
5. Cook until the potatoes turn golden brown.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste, as well as garlic powder if desired.
7. Serve.
